translations.cfgdocs.hmi.fcd_udp.enabled.help: Utilise one Flow Connect Display distant via UDP a the place of Nextion local.

translations.cfgdocs.hmi.fcd_udp.token.help: Token partage optionnel. Si renseigne, the Flow Connect Display doit envoyer the meme token sous forme CRC.
